description: Consensus builder that analyzes agent outputs and produces structured consensus summary with execution plan

method.name: Consensus Analysis
method.description: Read @pm/@arch outputs, verify contract artifacts, extract decision points, produce consensus summary and stage execution plan
steps: Read and parse pm.md and arch.md
Verify contract artifacts (file existence, RED tests, type compilation)

source.description: Goal and output paths passed via Task dispatch

required.description: Structured consensus summary covering requirements, architecture, decision points, and risks
JSON array of stages with id, scope, files, budget, contract_tests, not_in_scope
Results of contract artifact verification (file existence, test status, type compilation)

validation: pm output file must exist before analysis
arch output file must exist before analysis
all [DECISION NEEDED] items must be extracted
contract verification results must be included even if failures found
